title: Default state — page loads with defaults, no auto-run
verifies: metrics page loads with default config, no metrics_data blob in URL, and core UI elements visible

title: Deep-link with bad metrics_data blob falls back to defaults
verifies: corrupt base64 blob does not crash the page — falls back silently to default panel state

title: Deep-link with unknown version blob falls back to defaults
verifies: blob with version 9999 is ignored and page shows default panel configuration

title: Deep-link with override params only builds panel from scratch
verifies: chart_type and query override params configure the panel without a metrics_data blob

title: URL syncs metrics_data blob after manual query and Apply
verifies: running a query adds a valid metrics_data blob to the URL with correct version

title: metrics_data blob excludes volatile data (id, title, description)
verifies: decoded blob does not contain id, title, or description keys

title: Deep-link restores absolute from/to time range
verifies: deep-link with explicit from/to unix timestamps restores the time range correctly

title: Deep-link restores relative time period (period param wins)
verifies: period param takes precedence over from/to and restores relative time range

title: Share button disabled state — detects when web_url is not configured
verifies: share button is visible but disabled when web_url is not set

title: Share button copies shortened URL to clipboard
verifies: clicking share generates a short URL containing /short/ and copies it to clipboard with success toast

title: Share button shows loading state during API call
verifies: share button enters loading spinner state during API call and clears after completion

title: Deep-link blob restore auto-runs query on mount
verifies: valid metrics_data blob restores panel config and auto-executes query without manual Apply

title: Deep-link restores auto-refresh interval
verifies: refresh=30s param sets the auto-refresh interval on the page

title: Deep-link without stream — query populated, no stream selected
verifies: a deep-link with query but no stream_name does not crash the page

title: Share URL contains absolute from/to timestamps, not period
verifies: shared URL freezes time to absolute from/to seconds, not relative period
